last_action: Implemented encrypted database secrets, multi-payment channels per room, and enhanced billing/preview details.
summary: Phase 8: Security & Multi-Payment implementation complete. Secrets migrated to database with encryption. Payment options now support multiple accounts per room (PromptPay, Bank, Cash). Dashboard UI refined for consistency and transparency, with detailed breakdown views for all invoices and previews.
next_steps: Test the 'Forgot Password' flow using the new encrypted SMTP settings.
Verify LINE Messaging & Notify integration with database configurations.
Implement building-level filtering for financial reports and exports.
Perform full end-to-end regression test of the registration-to-billing lifecycle.

team_notes.Gemini-CLI: Significantly hardened the application by moving secrets to the database. Improved tenant UX by providing multiple payment options and detailed bill breakdowns. Fixed structural JS issues in the dashboard.
